### [`v0.5.0`](https://redirect.github.com/mrmans0n/compose-rules/releases/tag/v0.5.0)

> \[!IMPORTANT]
> This version targets detekt 2.x (specifically, `2.0.0-alpha.1`). It is incompatible with earlier detekt 1.x versions, so if you are using those, DO NOT UPDATE.

#### What's changed

- Add real world samples for ktlint and detekt and use as integration tests ([#​533](https://redirect.github.com/mrmans0n/compose-rules/issues/533)) [@​mrmans0n](https://redirect.github.com/mrmans0n)
- Add new default ViewModel factories ([#​531](https://redirect.github.com/mrmans0n/compose-rules/issues/531)) [@​mrmans0n](https://redirect.github.com/mrmans0n)
- Update junit-framework monorepo ([#​520](https://redirect.github.com/mrmans0n/compose-rules/issues/520)) @​[renovate\[bot\]](https://redirect.github.com/apps/renovate)
